reviews.review_description: This reminds me of old style arcade games with waves of zombies coming at you. You stand stationary with a gun that you have to reload and a flashlight. Zombies come at you in 360 action all in a very eerie setting with even creepier sounds. I may have screamed a few times. LOL A great score for the price! Check it out.
This game combines the scary scenes with enjoyable gameplay. The game really gets into you, especially at night.
